headline: IBD 50 Stocks To Watch: Defense Leader Howmet Aerospace Eyes Buy Point With Earnings Imminent
summary: Howmet stock is approaching a new buy point ahead of the company's imminent first-quarter earnings report. Shares jumped 5% Wednesday.
